## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Smith.ai and GrowthX to discuss content strategy progress and review proposed programmatic page wireframe.](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 80 articles (150,000 words) published by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Organic traffic slightly down, but rising traffic from AI sources (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Programmatic page wireframe needs refinement to create a more cohesive narrative flow](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Backlink reporting to be added to future updates](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [65 articles published, 80 total by week's end (150,000 words)](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Impressions for new articles show typical initial spike, then dip; expected to rise again in 1-2 months](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Some articles showing positive traffic trends, though small sample size](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Traffic Analysis

  - [Overall organic traffic slightly down](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Rising traffic from AI sources (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claw, Gemini, DeepSeek)](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Increase in SERP features (AI overview, featured snippet, people also ask)](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Potential impact from March 2023 core update; may indicate duplicate content issues](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [Plan to review and optimize existing content weekly](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Focus on high-value pages ranking for multiple keywords](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Maddy suggested tiered approach: categorize optimization efforts into Tier 1, 2, and 3 based on impact and effort required](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Programmatic Page Wireframe

  - [Proposed structure includes sections on marketing strategies, AI tools, and AI receptionist](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Maddy provided feedback on improving narrative flow and cohesion](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Suggested reframing title to encompass all sections (e.g., "How to leverage AI to grow your \[industry\] business")](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Recommended aligning content with small business owner perspective and needs](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

### Backlink Reporting

  - [Previous backlink efforts (15-20 mid to high DA) still pending](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [Jason (Head of GoToMarket) now managing backlink process](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Team to provide updates on backlink progress and add to future reports](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refine programmatic page wireframe based on Maddy's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
  - [Connect with Julian for Webflow component integration and design assistance](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Add backlink reporting to future updates](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Review and optimize existing content, focusing on high-value pages](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1075.0)
  - [Develop tiered approach for content optimization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [Regroup to present updated programmatic page strategy](https://fathom.video/share/PXcDc8xb2Ud-rhv1CgCBTkZiRdRcJx7Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
